title: Realism Vanilla
description: This modpack adds a bit more realism to the vanilla aspects of Minecraft and adds many more animations.
body:
![Realism Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f7caf235e06777ffd7a71b7f014ae9166cc4e53_0.webp)


**Realism Vanilla** aims to add realism to Minecraft while keeping the Vanilla aspects of the main game it self, it adds more animations, quality of life fixs, fixes bugs, a bit of blood when hitting any mob or player.

**Realism Vanilla* helps to make vanilla Minecraft more realistic with more 3D things, animations, better leaves and rain sound effects and there's many more to come by!

Realism Vanilla is only avaliable on Modrinth and licensed with [CC BY-NC](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc/4.0/deed.en) license.
